  "text": "func TestCredentialStoreCleanupJob_Run(t *testing.T) {
	// t.Parallel() - this was causing test failures, investigate before un-commenting
n1: 	ctx := context.Background()
n2: 	assert, require := assert.New(t), require.New(t)

n3: 	conn, _ := db.TestSetup(t, "postgres")

n5: 	wrapper := db.TestWrapper(t)
n6: 	kmsCache := kms.TestKms(t, conn, wrapper)
n7: 	_, prj := iam.TestScopes(t, iam.TestRepo(t, conn, wrapper))
n8: 	v := NewTestVaultServer(t)

n9: 	_, ct := v.CreateToken(t)
n10: 	in, err := NewCredentialStore(prj.GetPublicId(), v.Addr, []byte(ct))
n11: 	require.NoError(err)
n12: 	sche := scheduler.TestScheduler(t, conn, wrapper)
n13: 	j, err := newTokenRenewalJob(ctx, rw, rw, kmsCache)
n14: 	require.NoError(err)
n15: 	err = sche.RegisterJob(context.Background(), j)
n16: 	require.NoError(err)
n17: 	repo, err := NewRepository(ctx, rw, rw, kmsCache, sche)
n18: 	require.NoError(err)
n19: 	cs1, err := repo.CreateCredentialStore(ctx, in)
n20: 	require.NoError(err)

n21: 	_, ct = v.CreateToken(t)
n22: 	in, err = NewCredentialStore(prj.GetPublicId(), v.Addr, []byte(ct))
n23: 	require.NoError(err)
n24: 	cs2, err := repo.CreateCredentialStore(ctx, in)
n25: 	require.NoError(err)

	// Get token hmac for verifications below
n26: 	repoToken := allocToken()
n27: 	require.NoError(rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "store_id = ?", []any{cs1.PublicId}))
n28: 	cs1TokenHmac := repoToken.TokenHmac

n29: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n30: 	require.NoError(rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "store_id = ?", []any{cs2.PublicId}))
n31: 	cs2TokenHmac := repoToken.TokenHmac

	// create second token on cs2
n32: 	secondToken := testVaultToken(t, conn, wrapper, v, cs2, MaintainingToken, time.Hour)

n33: 	r, err := newCredentialStoreCleanupJob(ctx, rw, rw, kmsCache)
n34: 	require.NoError(err)

n35: 	err = sche.RegisterJob(ctx, r)
n36: 	require.NoError(err)

	// No credential stores should have been cleaned up
n37: 	err = r.Run(ctx)
n38: 	require.NoError(err)
n39: 	assert.Equal(0, r.numStores)

	// Register token revocation job needed for delete
n40: 	j1, err := newTokenRevocationJob(ctx, rw, rw, kmsCache)
n41: 	require.NoError(err)
n42: 	err = sche.RegisterJob(ctx, j1)
n43: 	require.NoError(err)

	// Soft delete both credential stores
n44: 	count, err := repo.DeleteCredentialStore(ctx, cs1.PublicId)
n45: 	require.NoError(err)
n46: 	assert.Equal(1, count)

n47: 	count, err = repo.DeleteCredentialStore(ctx, cs2.PublicId)
n48: 	require.NoError(err)
n49: 	assert.Equal(1, count)

	// Verify tokens have been set to revoke
n50: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n51: 	require.NoError(rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "store_id = ?", []any{cs1.PublicId}))
n52: 	assert.Equal(string(RevokeToken), repoToken.Status)

n53: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n54: 	require.NoError(rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "store_id = ?", []any{cs2.PublicId}))
n55: 	assert.Equal(string(RevokeToken), repoToken.Status)

	// Both soft deleted credential stores should not be cleaned up yet
n56: 	err = r.Run(ctx)
n57: 	require.NoError(err)
n58: 	assert.Equal(0, r.numStores)

	// Update cs1 token to be marked as revoked
n59: 	count, err = rw.Exec(ctx, updateTokenStatusQuery, []any{RevokedToken, cs1TokenHmac})
n60: 	require.NoError(err)
n61: 	assert.Equal(1, count)

	// cs1 should be deleted
n62: 	err = r.Run(ctx)
n63: 	require.NoError(err)
n64: 	assert.Equal(1, r.numStores)

	// Lookup of cs1 and its token should fail
n65: 	agg := allocListLookupStore()
n66: 	agg.PublicId = cs1.PublicId
n67: 	err = rw.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg)
n68: 	require.Error(err)
n69: 	assert.True(errors.IsNotFoundError(err))
n70: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n71: 	err = rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "token_hmac = ?", []any{cs1TokenHmac})
n72: 	require.Error(err)
n73: 	assert.True(errors.IsNotFoundError(err))

	// Lookup of cs2 and its token should not error
n74: 	_, err = repo.LookupCredentialStore(ctx, cs2.PublicId)
n75: 	require.NoError(err)
n76: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n77: 	err = rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "token_hmac = ?", []any{cs2TokenHmac})
n78: 	require.NoError(err)

	// Update cs2 token expiration time
n79: 	count, err = rw.Exec(ctx, "update credential_vault_token set expiration_time = now() where token_hmac = ?;", []any{cs2TokenHmac})
n80: 	require.NoError(err)
n81: 	assert.Equal(1, count)

	// cs2 still has a second token not yet revoked/expired
n82: 	err = r.Run(ctx)
n83: 	require.NoError(err)
n84: 	assert.Equal(0, r.numStores)

	// Lookup of cs2 and its token should not error
n85: 	_, err = repo.LookupCredentialStore(ctx, cs2.PublicId)
n86: 	require.NoError(err)
n87: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n88: 	err = rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "token_hmac = ?", []any{cs2TokenHmac})
n89: 	require.NoError(err)

	// set secondToken with an expired status
n90: 	count, err = rw.Exec(ctx, updateTokenStatusQuery, []any{ExpiredToken, secondToken.TokenHmac})
n91: 	require.NoError(err)
n92: 	assert.Equal(1, count)

	// With no un-expired or un-revoked tokens cs2 should now be deleted
n93: 	err = r.Run(ctx)
n94: 	require.NoError(err)
n95: 	assert.Equal(1, r.numStores)

	// Lookup of cs2 and its token should fail
n96: 	agg = allocListLookupStore()
n97: 	agg.PublicId = cs2.PublicId
n98: 	err = rw.LookupByPublicId(ctx, agg)
n99: 	require.Error(err)
n100: 	assert.True(errors.IsNotFoundError(err))
n101: 	repoToken = allocToken()
n102: 	err = rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "token_hmac = ?", []any{cs2TokenHmac})
n103: 	require.Error(err)
n104: 	assert.True(errors.IsNotFoundError(err))
n105: 	err = rw.LookupWhere(ctx, &repoToken, "token_hmac = ?", []any{secondToken.TokenHmac})
n106: 	require.Error(err)
n107: 	assert.True(errors.IsNotFoundError(err))
}
"
